matrix.ac_text: Required fields order date, customer, and at least one line item must be present.
Invalid product codes must be rejected.
Tax should be calculated for taxable products.
Order creation event must be available to downstream integrations.
Only valid state transitions are allowed.
Cancelled orders cannot move to shipped.
Status updates must be visible in reporting and notifications.

readable.acText: Required fields order date, customer, and at least one line item must be present.
readable.title: Order is created successfully when order date, customer, and one line item are provided

readable.acText: Required fields order date, customer, and at least one line item must be present.
readable.title: Save is blocked when customer is missing on the Create Order form

readable.acText: Required fields order date, customer, and at least one line item must be present.
readable.title: Save is blocked when order date is missing on the Create Order form

readable.acText: Required fields order date, customer, and at least one line item must be present.
readable.title: API rejects order creation when order date is missing

readable.acText: Required fields order date, customer, and at least one line item must be present.
readable.title: Save is blocked when no line items are added to the Create Order form

readable.acText: Required fields order date, customer, and at least one line item must be present.
readable.title: Database does not persist an order when required fields are missing in the request

readable.acText: Invalid product codes must be rejected.
readable.title: Valid product code order line is accepted and order is created successfully via API

readable.acText: Invalid product codes must be rejected.
readable.title: Multiple line items with one invalid product code are rejected as a single failed order request

readable.acText: Invalid product codes must be rejected.
readable.title: Unknown product code is rejected with field-level validation error on order creation API

readable.acText: Invalid product codes must be rejected.
readable.title: Blank product code is rejected on order entry screen before submission

readable.acText: Invalid product codes must be rejected.
readable.title: Malformed product code with special characters is rejected by the order API

readable.acText: Invalid product codes must be rejected.
readable.title: Unauthorized user cannot create an order with invalid product code through the API

readable.acText: Tax should be calculated for taxable products.
readable.title: Tax is calculated and persisted for taxable order line items on order creation

readable.acText: Tax should be calculated for taxable products.
readable.title: Non-taxable product returns zero tax on order creation

readable.acText: Tax should be calculated for taxable products.
readable.title: Tax is not recalculated for an order line marked as non-taxable by product master data

readable.acText: Tax should be calculated for taxable products.
readable.title: Mixed order calculates tax only for taxable line items

readable.acText: Tax should be calculated for taxable products.
readable.title: Tax amount rounds correctly for a taxable item with fractional cents

readable.acText: Tax should be calculated for taxable products.
readable.title: Tax calculation failure returns a controlled error when tax service is unavailable

readable.acText: Order creation event must be available to downstream integrations.
readable.title: Order creation event is published with alternate valid order data through the UI

readable.acText: Order creation event must be available to downstream integrations.
readable.title: Order creation publishes event to downstream integration queue after successful API order creation

readable.acText: Order creation event must be available to downstream integrations.
readable.title: Order creation event is recorded in the database event outbox after successful order insert

readable.acText: Order creation event must be available to downstream integrations.
readable.title: Order creation event is not exposed when the user lacks create order permission

readable.acText: Order creation event must be available to downstream integrations.
readable.title: Order creation event outbox record is not created when order insert fails validation

readable.acText: Order creation event must be available to downstream integrations.
readable.title: Order creation event is not duplicated when the same order request is submitted twice

readable.acText: Order creation event must be available to downstream integrations.
readable.title: Order creation event payload contains the created order identifiers and line item details

readable.acText: Order creation event must be available to downstream integrations.
readable.title: Order creation event is not published when downstream integration endpoint is unavailable

readable.acText: Only valid state transitions are allowed.
readable.title: Operations user updates order status from Pending to Confirmed using a valid transition

readable.acText: Only valid state transitions are allowed.
readable.title: Database stores only allowed status transition after a valid update

readable.acText: Only valid state transitions are allowed.
readable.title: API rejects invalid status transition from Shipped to Pending

readable.acText: Only valid state transitions are allowed.
readable.title: UI prevents invalid transition from Delivered to Processing for a completed order

readable.acText: Only valid state transitions are allowed.
readable.title: API returns validation error when the requested status is missing from the payload

readable.acText: Cancelled orders cannot move to shipped.
readable.title: Cancelled order remains blocked from shipping status update through API

readable.acText: Cancelled orders cannot move to shipped.
readable.title: Database preserves cancelled status after rejected shipped transition attempt

readable.acText: Cancelled orders cannot move to shipped.
readable.title: API rejects cancelled order status change to shipped with validation error

readable.acText: Cancelled orders cannot move to shipped.
readable.title: Database does not persist shipped status for cancelled order transition attempt

readable.acText: Cancelled orders cannot move to shipped.
readable.title: API blocks cancelled order from shipping when status update is submitted repeatedly

readable.acText: Cancelled orders cannot move to shipped.
readable.title: Database rejects cancelled-to-shipped transition for order with multiple historical status changes

readable.acText: Cancelled orders cannot move to shipped.
readable.title: API returns business-rule error when cancelled order is updated to shipped with missing correlation context

readable.acText: Cancelled orders cannot move to shipped.
readable.title: Database records rejected transition when cancelled order is submitted for shipped status without prior shipment data

readable.acText: Status updates must be visible in reporting and notifications.
readable.title: Order status change appears in reporting and notification feed for a completed order update

readable.acText: Status updates must be visible in reporting and notifications.
readable.title: UI displays status update in reporting and notification widgets after save confirmation

readable.acText: Status updates must be visible in reporting and notifications.
readable.title: API rejects order status update when reporting and notification event payload is missing required status value

readable.acText: Status updates must be visible in reporting and notifications.
readable.title: API returns unauthorized when a user without reporting access attempts to publish a status update

readable.acText: Status updates must be visible in reporting and notifications.
readable.title: Reporting and notifications show the latest status after two rapid updates to the same order

readable.acText: Status updates must be visible in reporting and notifications.
readable.title: Notification delivery failure does not block status visibility in reporting
